spec_match.rationale: Direct two-scroller test of the spec behaviour: previously the second cancelled the first, now both animate.

interactive.rationale: Single 'scroll both' button drives a clear visible animation.

edge_cases.rationale: Single happy-path animation. No probe distinguishing pre-130 vs post-130 behaviour; no test of the ancestor restriction; no test of cross-document concurrent.

openQuestions.title: Add a 'serial mode' counterfactual button
openQuestions.detail: A second button that runs the two scrolls with a tiny await/setTimeout gap, so the visitor sees the pre-130 cancel behaviour by contrast. Without that the demo just shows the feature working, with no reference point.
